Whether the mother experienced any emotional trauma (1) or not (0). Emotional trauma included emotional abuse, neglect, and grief or separation.

Whether the mother experienced any physical trauma (1) or not (0). Physical trauma included sexual abuse/assault, physical abuse/assault, domestic violence, extreme interpersonal violence, serious accident/illness, or natural/manmade disasters.

Whether the mother experience any other traumas (1) or not (0). Other trauma included community violence, school violence, bullying, war/terrorism/political violence, forced displacement, military trauma, or other

Whether the mother experienced any interpersonal trauma (1) or not (0). Interpersonal trauma included sexual abuse/assault, physical abuse/assault, domestic violence, and extreme interpersonal violence.
Whether the mother experienced any emotional trauma (1) or not (0). Emotional trauma included emotional abuse and neglect.
Whether the mother experienced any community/societal violence (1) or not (0). Community/societal violence included community violence, school violence, and bullying.

Whether the mother experienced any collective/political trauma (1) or not (0). Collective/political trauma included war/terrorism/political violence, natural/manmade disasters, forced displacement, and military trauma.
Whether the mother experienced any loss or medical trauma (1) or not (0). Loss or medical trauma included serious accident/illness and traumatic grief/separation.
